name: Fuhang Soy Milk
description: Not exactly breaking news, but this is one of the best breakfast joints in Taipei. Get there early (and I mean early), because the queue will go around the block and then some. Get the 厚燒餅 houshaobing thick baked bing with egg. The salty soy milk with 油條 youtiao dough sticks for that dipping action.

name: 旭達豆漿店 Xu Da Soy Milk Shop
description: They only do one type of egg pancake, the classic. Delish crispy skin. Paired with soy milk or black tea with soy milk.

name: 太和豆漿 Tai He Soy Milk
description: This place is mos def off the beaten track in Banqiao, but their signature “Unparalleled Sea View Egg Steamed Bun” bun is a must try. Best come by bike to work up some appetite because this thing is not for the faint hearted. Get the “Unparalleled Sea View Egg Steamed Bun”. Dough sticks, ham, cheese, an omelette and peanut butter stuffed inside a 饅頭 mantou. Yes, you read that right.

name: 佳香點心大王 Jia Xiang Snack King
description: Get the 鹹豆漿 salty soy drink with a little chili oil, 燒餅夾蛋 baked bing，小籠包 soup dumplings.

name: 三重蛋餅大王 Sanchong Danbing King
description: A popular, efficient operation out in Sanchong with a different take on 蛋餅 danbing egg pancakes. It’s fried, cut with scissors and drenched in sauce. Yum!

name: 畊 PLOW Yunong
description: Slightly upscale breakfast & brunch joint in Shilin. Burgers, fry ups, plus various Taiwanese breakfast classics with a unique touch. I like their take on Taiwanese danbing, but really I could recommend half the menu.

name: 津津豆漿 Jin Jin Soy Milk
description: Classic Taiwanese breakfast fare out in Datong. Get the fried danbing with Chinese chives, salted soy drink.

name: Wenzhou Street Radish Pancake
description: Radish pancakes are a Taiwanese staple.

name: Lao Shandong Homemade Noodles
description: Great beef noodle soup down in the basement in Ximending.

name: Fuhong Beef Noodles
description: A few blocks north is Fuhong. A+ beef noodles. Jianhong next door is also legit.

name: 田舍手打麵 西寧店
description: Tiny udon noodle shop.

name: 南港老張燒餅店
description: If you’re in the Nangang area, do yourself a favour and get a baked pepper pork bun. Insanely good.

name: 匡記涼麵
description: Delicious cold noodles.

name: 碼頭老火鍋
description: Excellent hotpot.

name: A Cheng Goose
description: Smoked goose.

name: Chan Shifan
description: Top notch Taiwanese izakaya.

name: Fireweeds
description: Excellent izakaya.

name: 玄德素食（大慈素食）
description: Buddhist vegetarian canteen in the heart of Ximending. You pay by weight.

name: 刈包吉-萬華
description: Gua bao a.k.a. braised pork buns.

name: Chan Chi Hotpot Dunnan Branch
description: Great hotpot. Pre-book.

name: enishi
description: There’s so much good ramen in town. Enishi is up there.

name: 辣·得記麻辣火鍋-安居總店
description: Great hotpot.

name: Takumi Dumplings
description: Fabulous dumplings. Busy but moves fast.

name: Wangji Fucheng Zongzi
description: Delicious steamed 粽子. Pair with daikon soup.

name: 彰化肉圓
description: Small stand selling Changhua meat balls with glutinous rice.

name: Pang too food / wonton shop
description: Fantastic wonton soup joint.

name: Pizza Has a Face
description: There’s not a lot of great pizza in Taiwan, but this place is the exception.

name: 涮辛酸麻辣火鍋吃到飽
description: Another great hotpot joint.

name: Daqiaotou rice cakes 大橋頭老牌筒仔米糕
description: Not the Korean kind of rice cake, but rather glutinous rice in the shape of a cupcake with pork, egg and a brown sauce.

name: Jin Da Braised Pork Rice 今大滷肉飯
description: Braised pork rice out in Sanchong.

name: 巧房餡餅
description: Savoury and sweet pies.

name: 南川麵館 Nanchuan Noodle Restaurant
description: One of my favourite noodle places. Don’t forget the side dishes!

name: 糊塗麵
description: Signature dish is “messy” noodles.

name: 韓記老虎麵食館
description: Great beef noodle restaurant. Add some pig blood or dough sticks to the broth.

name: 小慧涼麵店
description: Cold noodles.

name: 春蒜咖喱
description: Cool little curry joint out in Nangang.

name: 種福園
description: Northeast China-style restaurant. Their little wraps 斤餅 with shredded meat 京醬肉絲 are great。

name: The Six Omurice 陸角蛋包飯
description: Great omelette rice place.

name: Yansan Night Market
description: Probably the best night market in Taipei. Get in the queue somewhere and order something delicious.

name: Wu Wang Tsai Chi
description: Taiwanese-style spring rolls (i.e. with fresh/soft wrap, not fried.) They’re huge and delicious.

name: Nanjichang Night Market
description: Underrated night market. Probably my fave after Yansan.

name: Ningxia Night Market
description: A busy night market in the centre of town.

name: Shih Chia Big Rice Ball
description: Glutinous rice dumplings filled with meat served in a broth.

name: Huang Ji Braised Pork
description: Classic Taiwanese fare, 魯肉飯 braised pork rice.

name: Lane 10 Curry Rice
description: Great Japanese curry joint.

name: Fujin Tree Taiwanese Cuisine & Champagne
description: A bit bougie, but simply excellent food. Think refined takes on 熱炒 stir-fy dishes. They offer Taiwanese wine too.

name: azie
description: Upscale take on beef noodle soup inside the Regent hotel restaurant.

name: Tamsui Wenhua A-gei 淡水文化阿給
description: 阿給 A-gei is unique to Tamsui. Tofu, mung bean noodles wrapped in surimi. Hop on the Red MRT line to Tamsui and try it.

name: 本願豆花店-西門 Origin Tofu Pudding
永昌傳統豆花店
description: The almond douhua is a must-try.

name: La Grotta
description: Amazing cakes (and tea or coffee).

name: 庄頭豆花担
description: Cute little douhua place on Civic Boulevard.

name: Yu Pin Yuan Iced and Hot Tangyuan
OPIUM FEN-YUAN
description: Excellent douhua chain.

name: Haritts 甜甜圈
description: My favourite donut shop.

name: 杏福冰館
description: Shaved ice and douhua.

name: 冰豆
description: Douhua.

name: 杉味豆花
description: Douhua.

name: Ten Ten Den Den
description: Fantastic dessert place out in 板橋 Banqiao.

name: 得正 Dezheng Oolong Tea Project
description: Nationwide chain.

name: 南海茶道 Nanhai Sado
description: Probably my fav tea shop with refreshing green & oolong teas. Has more shops in central Taiwan.

name: D23 Cafe
description: Great coffee & interior. Owner David’s been around for 10 years.

name: RUFOUS COFFEE
description: OG Taipei coffee spot.

name: Oasis Coffee Roasters
description: One of several locations.

name: All Day Roasting Company
description: Also have cafés in Minsheng and Dadaocheng.

name: Sidoli Radio
description: This place is a vibe.

name: VWI by chadwang
description: Great coffee. Also has a spot at the airport. Perfect for a pre-flight cuppa.

name: BrewBrew
description: Small coffee joint near Zhongshan.

name: Wangtea Lab
description: Tea bar with lots of exciting ways of brewing tea. You can buy tea next door.

name: Draft Land
description: Cocktails on draft.

name: 掌門精釀啤酒Tap Bistro Zhangmen - 微風松高店
description: Great craft beer spot in downtown Taipei with views of Taipei 101. Finding the elevator to the rooftop terrace is a bit of a quest..

name: Hope Square Farmer’s Market
description: Held every weekend on Saturday and Sunday, offering a wide variety of produce from all over the country. Every week a different county is highlighted.

name: 巷口飯糰
description: Best 飯糰 🍙 in Taichung. Out in 中科 area though.

name: Elephants Rock 象堡/手工蛋餅/烘蛋堡/手工堡
description: Great 蛋餅 egg pancakes. All homemade. Owner is a great guy.

name: 長江早餐店
description: They’ve got all the classics and do ‘em well. Soup dumplings, savoury soy milk 鹹豆漿, 燒餅.

name: 大力酥皮蛋餅
description: Danbing with a crispy, flaky texture. Delish.

name: Meat & Egg Toast
description: You need to get there early, but damn, are those breakfast sandwiches tasty.

name: 精武路無名燒餅店
description: Classic breakfast joint.

name: 好小子擔仔麵
description: Classic 熱炒 joint. Bring friends.

name: High Jump Sushi
description: Sushi with a hip hop vibe. I like!

name: 山東老牌水餃牛肉麵
description: The biggest baddest dumplings ever.

name: 初碗麵
description: Great noodle joint.

name: 金飽滿手作餃子
description: Pan-fried dumplings are the best.

name: 嘉賓平價鐵板燒
description: Taiwanese style teppanyaki.

name: 太初麵食りょうり
description: Classic noodle place.

name: 姜蘇涼麵-大業店
description: Cold noodle joint with miso soup.

name: SAMI 卅麵
description: Outstanding noodles.

name: Shin Yuan (West)
description: Slightly upscale Taiwanese classics. Perfectly executed.

name: 夜間部爌肉飯
description: 爌肉飯 Braised pork rice. Add a side dish like soy braised tofu, blanched veggies, bamboo shoots or pig blood.

name: Zhengzong Turkey Rice
description: Turkey rice is a Chiayi classic. Side dishes are on point too.

name: 吳記脆皮肉圓
description: Meatballs wrapped in starch, the fried kind. Very, very good.

name: 叁食初 台中美食推薦/台中私房菜
description: Taiwanese (熱炒 rechao) classics in a slightly more upscale setting. 水蓮 or crested floating heart is a favourite.

name: 太初麵食
description: Various noodles, great side dishes.

name: 黑肉麵
description: Classic Taichung restaurant. Pork rib over rice is the go-to, with fish ball soup.

name: 精誠牛肉麵 豬腳麵
description: Beef noodle soup.

name: ​​森川丼丼大橋橫町
description: Taichung is full of Japanese restaurants (because: history), but this is a personal fav. Nothing fancy really, just good rice bowls, sushi and other tasty things.

name: 老棠酸辣粉
description: Sour and spicy vermicelli noodles with pork/beef/goat and other options.

name: 台中肉員
description: Another 肉圓 ba-wan crystal meatball shop.

name: 春水堂 Chun Shui Tang National Taiwan Museum of Fine Arts Branch
description: This place is said to have invented bubble tea. Multiple branches with varied menu.

name: 蘇記健康滷味
description: 滷味 is classic Taiwanese fare. Soy stewed everything.

name: Veggienius Dim Sum
description: Vegetarian dim sum.

name: 小次男 咖哩所
description: Curry joint.

name: 加里曼丹特色小吃
description: The area north of Taichung station is home to dozens of Indonesian restaurants and shops.

name: 東興包子
description: Steamed bao.

name: 美村豆花
description: A favourite douhua place.

name: 海福鹽滷豆製所
description: The douhua with cilantro and peanut is to die for. I always get the soy milk too. So good.

name: 陸丘甜室
description: I love donuts. Cute little shop tucked away in an alley.

name: Pa Shih Mesona Jianxing Main Shop
description: Shaved ice. Be prepared to queue.

name: Overture序曲
description: Dessert shop.

name: Chi Cha San Chen
description: Hipster deluxe tea “concept” shop. You pay for it, but the tea was goooood.

name: HAUSINC CAFE
description: Probably my favourite coffee place in Taichung. Only the playlist could be improved (but that goes for just about every coffee place in Taiwan).

name: Tamp Temper
description: Great spot. Has two more spots in town.

name: coffee stopover
description: Taichung coffee mainstay. Wide variety of beans and brew methods. Another location close by.

name: 仁將 Cafeterry
description: Bike themed cafe. Owner does great desserts.

name: RiceCaff'e米咖啡(不定時公休放在FB頂置貼文)
description: Great little coffee spot

name: 彰化阿璋肉圓
description: 肉圓 Ba-wan is a crystal meatball wrapped in starch and rice flour, which can be steamed or fried and can be found all over Changhua county.

name: 社頭味香鍋貼水餃專賣店
description: Potsticker joint in 社頭 Shetou.

name: 員林米糕榕
description: Sticky rice served with minced pork. Yum!

name: 彰化劉肉圓
description: 肉圓 Ba-wan, crystal meatball. The Liu family serves the steamed version.

name: 阿星爌肉飯
description: Braised pork rice. Add an egg and bamboo shoots.

name: 大元蔴薯(鹹麻糬)
description: Tiny mochi shop right beside the temple. Sweet and savoury (!) mochi fillings.

name: 豪咖啡 haocoffee
description: Located in the sock capital of Taiwan, 社頭 Shetou (40 mins from Taichung by train), this might just be my favourite coffee place in Taiwan. A great selection of beans, some fantastic espresso-based drinks and simply outstanding cakes and desserts. Great staff too. And the shop next door sells fantastic socks!

name: 南海茶道 彰化民族總店
description: Superb tea shop. No frills oolong tea. Perfect on a hot summer’s day.

name: SMARTFISH
description: Fish stew of Netflix documentary fame. Lives up to the hype though. Has a second branch if the queue is crazy here.

name: 嘉義黑人滷熟肉
description: Meat heavy restaurant. Pork tongue, pork blood, sausages. That kind of thing.

name: 榮 丼飯 定食Sakae さかえ
description: Japanese rice bowls and set menus.

name: 阿娥豆漿豆花
description: Douhua.

name: 咱台灣人的冰
description: Shaved ice.

name: Miho Coffee
description: Exceptional coffee.

name: MIMICO COFFEE
description: Great little cafe.

name: 趙家燒餅
description: Oven baked pies. Add 油條 dough stick and egg.

name: 紅記早點
description: Taiwanese breakfast, with “old fashioned” egg pancakes.

name: 水仙宮飯糰
description: Breakfast rice balls.

name: 林家肉燥飯
description: Rice with minced pork. Run by rapper 阿雞 Gloj.

name: Zai Fa Hao Hundred-Year Dumplings
description: 粽子 rice dumplings, pair with soup.

name: 七誠米粿
description: Tainan-style rice cakes. Chewy texture. Add an egg and dip it in the broth.

name: 無名米糕
description: Same as above.

name: 檨仔林阿全碗粿
description: Minced meat topped with starch in a small bowl. Steamed.

name: 阿牛牛肉湯
description: Tainan is famous for its fresh beef soup.

name: 阿龍意麵
description: Another Tainan classic. 意麵 yi noodles.

name: Six Thousand Beef Soup
description: Another beef soup place.

name: 邱記阿來水煎包
description: Pan fried and steamed dumplings, aka 水煎包. Usually with Chinese chives and vermicelli filling.

name: 阿松割包
description: Pork buns.

name: 大菜市包仔王
description: Steamed bao paired with various other dishes.

name: 夏林臭豆腐
description: Stinky tofu.

name: 小茂屋
description: Noodle joint.

name: 永林綜合料理 Yonlin Restaurant
description: Great hotpot place out by the university

name: Win Chang Beef Soup Anping Main Shop
description: Beef soup restaurant with 19.000 reviews.

name: 誠仔虎咬豬/台南美食/刈包/涼麵/杏仁茶
description: Cold noodles, 刈包 pork buns and almond milk tea, I can’t think of a better combo.

name: Lily Fruit
description: A Tainan institution. Fresh fruit, shaved ice, douhua.

name: 謝家八寶冰
description: Shaved ice with eight “gems” garnish. Think peanuts, red beans, green beans, barley, taro balls.

name: 曾家古早味麻糬
description: Mochi to die for, sells out quickly.

name: Kadoya
description: Japanese-style dessert shop. Instagram hotspot.

name: 懷舊小棧杏仁豆腐冰
description: Iced tofu.

name: 修安扁擔豆花 Xiu'an Douhua
description: Douhua.

name: Dongzhou brown sugar and milk shop
description: Quite simply the best brown sugar boba milk you’ll ever have.

name: 道南館 自家烘焙咖啡館
description: Great coffee. Choose your preferred brewing method.

name: 曉咖啡
description: Taiwan’s coffee game is strong.

name: 沃隼釀造 WE Drink Beer Company
description: Great craft brews with Taiwanese flavours.

name: 舊李合興蜜餞
description: Dried fruit store.

name: 阿姨蛋餅
description: Superb danbing out near Hamasen.

name: 福記臭豆腐
description: Insanely good stinky tofu in an upscale setting.

name: 下一鍋水煎包
description: Amazing steam fried dumplings.

name: Gang Yuan Beef Noodle Restaurant
description: Beef noodle soup.

name: 九色香雞排
description: Classic late night food: fried chicken bits, plus tofu, beans, mushrooms, rice blood cakes. Pick a seasoning and grab a beer from the 7-11 opposite.

name: 孫家肉粽
description: Rice dumplings.

name: 阿進切仔麵
description: Noodles, thick soups, various charcuterie.

name: Duck Zhen
description: Classic fare, with a duck meat.

name: 堀江麵
description: Beef or pork noodles (or rice) with 沙茶 sauce.

name: Lin's Mei-Nung Hakka Rice Noodles Since 1966
description: Classic Hakka dishes.

name: 丸浜霜淇淋
description: Great ice cream with some outlandish flavours.

name: Donuts!
description: 統帥芋冰城&芋粿

name: 猻物咖啡
description: Great coffee joint. Sells Taiwan grown coffee.

name: 東洲黑糖奶舖（鹽埕店）
description: The best black sugar boba milk, Kaohsiung branch.

name: 劉記早點
description: All the classics. 小籠包 xiaolongbao, scallion pancakes, salty soy drink.

name: 一碗豆腐
description: Have yet to try this, but it looks delish.

name: 福記餛飩
description: Tucked away behind the Pingtung nightmarket. Fried wonton noodle soup is their signature dish.

name: 阿中手路菜｜恆春台式川味料理
description: Great Taiwanese dishes. Reservations are a must.

name: 牛肉福路邊店
description: Great beef soup.

name: 秋林牛乳大王
description: Quite possibly the best shaved ice place I’ve been to. Pick your (fruit) toppings of choice and add boba. Yum!

name: 阿倫冰店 潮州燒冷冰/店休請搜尋粉絲專頁
無名白糖粿
description: Classic market snacks like fried sweet potato bun and white sugar rice cake.

name: 早點大王
description: Get the pork pepper bun.

name: Ming Kui Breakfast Restaurant
description: Great breakfast burgers and sando’s.

name: Rong Shu Xia Rice Noodles 榕樹下米苔目
description: If you only have time for one dinner in Taitung, go here. Get the classic 招牌米苔目. Short, chewy rice noodles and add fish ball soup and other side dishes..

name: 萬家鄉 「原味料理 不添加味素」
description: Classic Taiwanese dishes, including beef noodle soup and 酸辣湯 sour spicy soup.

name: 南北餃子館
description: Dumpling joint.

name: Lin's Stinky Tofu 林家臭豆腐
王子豬排
description: Pork chop set meals.

name: 七里香水煎包
description: Big steam fried dumplings.

name: Chan Kee mochi 陳記麻糬
description: Insanely good mochi.

name: 台東古早味寶桑豆花
description: Douhua.

name: Asan Shaved Ice 古早味阿桑剉冰
Community Cafe' 墾墨咖啡
description: Great coffee place on the way to the train station.

name: 允芳茶園
description: Great tea shop. Get the 紅烏龍 black oolong tea.

name: Hua Lien Xiang Bian Shi
description: Classic dumpling place. Get dumplings with broth 扁食湯 or chili oil version 紅油抄手. Add a 小菜 side dish as is customary.

name: 叁丸日式料理
description: Excellent Japanese fare.

name: Gong Zheng Bun Store
description: Soup dumplings, xiaolongbao, steamed dumplings.

name: 一碗小
description: Great noodles. Lamb or beef broth, clear or braised in soy sauce.

name: Guo Sheng Dipping Sauce Chicken Cutlet
description: Fried chicken joint in central Hualien.

name: 木子食堂
description: Japanese kushiyaki restaurant. Wash down with beer.

name: 拉麵 匠心食堂
description: Small ramen place. Can get busy.

name: CURRY MAN
description: Japanese style curry.

name: 吉爾泰
description: Low-key Thai place, though a bit out of the way.

name: ​​小木屋玉里麵
description: Classic Yuli noodles. Get some side dishes like 滷蛋 eggs boiled in soy sauce, 豆乾 dried tofu, or 豬皮  pig’s skin if you’re feeling adventurous.

name: 橋頭臭豆腐
description: Stinky tofy.

name: 牛哥平價牛排
description: Taiwanese style beef cutlets.

name: Tsai-Ji Tofu Pudding
description: Tofu pudding with all the fittings. Great on a hot day.

name: 半寓咖啡
description: Excellent coffee.

name: Giocare義式.手沖咖啡
description: Another excellent coffee place. Check opening hours on Google Maps.

name: 山友拉麵
description: Ramen place in Jiaoxi.

name: Lingbei Kaohao Japanese Grill Tavern
description: Japanese izakaya grill joint.

name: 綠色臭豆腐
description: Stinky tofu stall.

name: Sinbow Scallion Expert
description: Delicious scallion pancakes in Jiaoxi.
